title: Affirm Transaction
description: Represents an Affirm payment transaction, capturing the full lifecycle from authorization through capture, refund, and void. Transactions are created by exchanging a checkout token via the Transactions API after a customer completes the Affirm checkout flow.

id.description: A unique identifier representing the transaction, assigned by Affirm upon authorization.

checkout_id.description: A unique identifier referencing the Checkout object that originated this transaction.

order_id.description: Identifies the order within the merchant's order management system, used for reconciliation.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the transaction.

amount.description: The original amount financed to the customer, expressed in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD).

amount_refunded.description: The cumulative amount refunded to the customer from this transaction, in the smallest currency unit.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for this transaction.

created.description: The timestamp when the transaction was created, in RFC 3339 format.

authorization_expiration.description: The timestamp after which the transaction authorization expires and can no longer be captured, in RFC 3339 format.

provider_id.description: A unique identifier of the financing provider for this transaction.

remove_tax.description: Indicates whether tax was paid by the financing provider. Applicable to Affirm Connect integrations only.

events.description: Array of TransactionEvent objects documenting the full history of actions taken on this transaction.

token.description: A JWT signing the JSON response body. When PII is included in the response, this token is also encrypted.

TransactionEvent.description: A single event in the lifecycle of a transaction documenting an action such as authorization, capture, refund, or void.

id.description: A unique identifier for this transaction event.

type.description: The type of action represented by this event.

amount.description: The monetary amount associated with this event in the smallest currency unit.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for this event.

fee.description: The Affirm transaction fee charged for this event, in the smallest currency unit.

created.description: The timestamp when this event was created, in RFC 3339 format.

reference_id.description: An external reference identifier for this event, such as a merchant capture or refund reference.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata associated with this event.

SettlementEvent.description: A disbursement line item from Affirm to the merchant, associated with a specific transaction event.

id.description: A unique identifier for this settlement event.

transaction_id.description: The identifier of the transaction this settlement event is associated with.

transaction_event_id.description: The identifier of the specific transaction event that triggered this settlement.

amount.description: The net disbursement amount in the smallest currency unit.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for this settlement.

created.description: Timestamp when this settlement event was created, in RFC 3339 format.

type.description: The type of settlement event, corresponding to the originating transaction action.
